command: for day in 12 13 14; do echo '=== April $day ==='; LOG=~/Documents/Projects/AetherBot/Logs/AetherBot_2026-04-$day.txt; echo 'All harvests:'; grep 'HARVEST DONE' $LOG; echo '--- Strategies used ---'; grep 'HARVEST DONE' $LOG | grep -oE '\| [A-Z_]+' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn; echo '--- POS WARNING detail ---'; grep 'POS WARNING' $LOG | head -3; echo '--- SETTLE ---'; grep 'SETTLE' $LOG | tail -5; echo ''; done 2>&1
